analysis.name: Dell Technologies (Ondo Tokenized)
analysis.summary: DELLON是Ondo发行的代币化股票，对应Dell Technologies，价格与DELL股票挂钩。近期价格小幅上涨1.92%，但链上pumpfun上存在同名仿盘，流动性极低，风险极高。

recommendation.invalidation: 若官方Ondo代币在主流DEX有足够流动性且价格偏离DELL股票过大时，可考虑套利，但当前仿盘无任何投资价值。

catalysts: DELL股票本身上涨可能带动DELLON价格

latestNews.title: Dell Technologies (DELLON) Price Prediction (June 2026): Forecast, Technical Levels, and RWA Token Outlook - WEEX
Dell Technologies (Ondo Tokenized) Price: DELLON/USD Live Price Chart, Market Cap & News Today - CoinGecko
Dell Technologies Tokenized Stock (Ondo) price today, DELLon to USD live price, marketcap and chart - CoinMarketCap

fundamentals: DELLON是Ondo Finance发行的代币化股票，1:1锚定DELL股票，由Ondo托管并支持赎回
官方代币在以太坊、BNB Chain、Solana等多链发行，但当前pumpfun上的DELL/SOL对是仿盘，非官方
官方DELLON市值约1.8万美元，流通量42.33枚，价格428.98美元，接近DELL股票价格
仿盘市值仅2160美元，流动性极低，24h交易量5.76美元
marketRead: 官方DELLON价格与DELL股票基本一致，24h涨1.92%，交易量16万美元，流动性尚可
pumpfun上的仿盘DELL/SOL价格0.00000216美元，无历史K线，流动性为0，交易量仅5.76美元，属于高度可疑的垃圾币
risks: pumpfun上的DELL/SOL是仿盘，非官方代币，合约风险极高，可能归零
官方DELLON虽锚定股票，但代币化资产存在托管风险、监管风险
仿盘流动性极低，买入后无法卖出
市场关注度低，仅3人关注
watchlist: 官方Ondo DELLON在主流DEX的流动性变化
sourceNotes: 数据来源CoinGecko和DexScreener，pumpfun对数据可靠性低
新闻来源WEEX和CoinMarketCap，内容为常规报道

profile.name: Dell Technologies (Ondo Tokenized)
profile.description: DELLon is the Ondo Tokenized version of Dell Technologies Inc, giving tokenholders economic exposure similar to holding DELL and reinvesting any dividends. Ondo tokenized stocks enable non-US retail and institutional users around the world to instantly mint and redeem tokenized U.S. stocks and ETFs, 24 hours a day, five days a week with full access to traditional exchange liquidity. Additional restrictions apply. Learn more at ondo.finance/global-markets.
